title: Things I have learned about Tech Leadership

title: Getting inspired at the BBC Engineering Conference

summary: The BBC’s Engineering teams develop and run our digital products at scale — ensuring our digital services are available and accessible to audiences that need them the most, and as as reliable as our broadcast ones. title: Hello from Delivery at the BBC

summary: At the start of the year I took up a job as Head of Delivery for BBC Product Group as part of a new cross discipline leadership team led by our CPO Storm Fagan. title: It’s time we all started thinking of BBC’s Engineering as one of the best in the world

title: BBC Hack Week
